characters.name: Adelaide Prentiss
characters.description: Adelaide Prentiss (Addy)Biographical InformationAge17StatusAlivePhysical DescriptionGenderFemaleRelationship InformationFamilyAshton Prentiss(sister)Mrs. Calloway (mother)Mr. Prentiss (father)Mr. Calloway (former stepfather)Justin (mother's boyfriend)Iris Prentiss-Kleinfelter (niece)Eli Kleinfelter (brother-in-law)FriendsBronwyn RojasCooper ClayNate MacauleyMaeve RojasPhoebe LawtonKnox MyersKrisJanaeVanessa ClarkLuis SantosEnemiesJake RiordanSimon Kelleher Adelaide "Addy" Prentiss is one of the four students at Bayview High suspected of murdering Simon Kelleher. She is a senior at Bayview who is known for her good looks and her relationship with Jake Riordan. In the early stages of the novel, Addy is not very ambitious and Nate describes her as not having a thought in her head other than her boyfriend. She is in a so-called "perfect" relationship with her controlling boyfriend. However, she cheats on her boyfriend, Jake Riordan, with one of his friends, TJ Forrester. The secret is revealed after Simon's death on his website, and her life falls apart. Her boyfriend breaks up with her, all her friends except Cooper leave her, and she kept being slut-shamed by Vanessa, a girl who she thought was her friend. She also becomes close friends with Nate, Bronwyn, Janae, Maeve, Phoebe and Knox. By the end of the book, Addy is opinionated and not afraid to say what's on her mind. Addy's character undergoes significant development throughout the novel. Initially depicted as a typical high school "queen bee," Addy's vulnerability and complexity are gradually revealed as the story unfolds. Her struggles with societal expectations, peer pressure, and maintaining a façade become evident as she faces the repercussions of Simon's death. Readers witness Addy's transformation from a seemingly superficial character to a more resilient and self-aware individual.

characters.name: Bayview Four
characters.description: The murder club Bayview Four(also known asThe assassins club) are the most infamous students ofBayview High School: four strangers from different worlds who got caught up in a hurricane of secrets and lies as the prime suspects inSimon Kelleher's killer. After the four witness Simon's death in the detention room, they become the main suspects in the case and the main victims of Simon's gossip app, About That.

characters.name: Brandon Weber
characters.description: Brandon WeberAliasesBrandonRelativesMrs. Weber (mother)Lance Weber(father)Biographical informationMarital statusSingleDate of deathMarch 5, 2020Place of deathConstruction SitePhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleEye colorBlueBrandon Weberwas the son of Lance Weber and his unnamed wife. He was a lead character inOne Of Us Is Next, know for hooking up withPhoebeand accidentally killing Phoebe's father, before he died trying to take a shortcut through the construction site, doing a dare.

characters.name: Bronwyn Rojas
characters.description: Bronwyn RojasBiographical InformationAge17StatusAlivePhysical DescriptionGenderFemaleRelationship InformationFamilyJavier Rojas(father)Mrs. Rojas(mother)Maeve Rojas(sister)FriendsYumikoKateAddy PrentissCooper ClayNate MacauleyJanae(pre-assumed)EnemiesSimon KelleherJake Riordan  Bronwyn Rojasis a part ofthe Bayview Four. She is a smart girl who comes from a family of Yale graduates, so she is constantly academically pressured by her parents. Despite the pressure, it is Bronwyn's dream to attend the same school as her family. She enjoys playing the piano, attending extracurricular activities, and watching Buffy the Vampire Slayer with her sisterMaeve Rojas. Maeve was diagnosed with leukemia when she was seven and wasn’t fully disease-free until she was 14 years old. Bronwyn is heavily impacted by the pressure her Parents put on her which often determines how she behaves. She is very ambitious and goes extreme lengths for good grades. Over all, she is a very moral as well as caring person as she helps free Nate from prison and even gives him another chance.

characters.description: Bronwyn RojasBiographical InformationAge17GenderFemaleEye ColorBrownHair ColorDark BrownStatusAlive (necklace found at crime scene - could be dead)Character InformationOccupationStudent (Bayview High School)EducationBayview High SchoolNicknameB (Maeve Rojas)RelationshipsFamilyMr. Rojas (father)Mrs. Rojas (mother)Maeve Rojas(sister)FriendsNate MacauleyAddy PrentissCooper ClayJanae MatthewsRomance(s)Nate Macauley(boyfriend)Evan Nieman(ex-boyfriend)EnemiesSimon KelleherJake Riordan†Fiona JenningsPortrayalPortrayerMarianly TejadaSeasonsSeason 1Season 2First AppearanceLast AppearancePilotSimon Says Game OverBronwyn Rojasis one of the main characters in thePeacockoriginal series,One Of Us Is Lying. Top of her class, Bronwyn is so focused on the future, she rarely thinks about the present. Most classmates admire her more than they like her, and a few rivals wonder how far she'd go to get ahead. Bronwyn lives in Baywiew with her parents and younger sisterMaeve.

characters.name: Cooper Clay
characters.description: Cooper ClayBiographical InformationAge17StatusAlivePhysical DescriptionGenderMaleRelationship InformationFamilyMr. Clay (father)Mrs. Clay (mother)Lucas Clay (brother)Nonny (grandmother)FriendsAdelaide PrentissBronwyn RojasNate MacauleyEnemiesJake RiordanSimon Kelleher Cooper Clayis a seventeen-year-old male and the “Jock” of the Bayview Four because he plays baseball. He is shown to be kind, caring and charismatic. Not only is baseball very meaningful to Cooper and his dad, but he is also exceptional at playing the sport, so his goal is to get a scholarship for it. At first, it is thought that his secret is that he takes steroids to enhance his sports performances, however this is not the case at all. Jake Riordan had asked Simon Kelleher to change the secret to something untrue, due to not wanting people to know he has a gay friend. His real secret is that he is gay and is in a relationship with a German underwear model Kris Becker.

characters.name: Eli Kleinfelter
characters.description: Eli KleinfelterGeneral InformationGenderMaleAge30sRelationshipsRomance(s)Ashton Prentiss(girlfriend)AppearanceEye ColorDarkHair Color, Lengh, StyleDark, curlyOtherAppears InOne Of Us Is Lying (Novel)OccupationLawyer Eli Kleinfelteris a young lawyer in his 30s who works for Until Proven, a pro bono legal group from Western California. After being contacted byBronwyn Rojas, he agrees to representNate Macauleywhen he was arrested. Eli helps Nate to prove his innocence and avoid federal prison. He also begins a relationship withAshton Prentiss. According to Bronwyn, Eli doesn’t look even ten years older than her. He has wild curly hair, a sparse goatee, and intense dark eyes.

characters.name: Ellen Macauley
characters.description: Ellen Macauleyleft Nate and his dad when Nate was just 11 years old. She is bipolar and before she left, Ellen didn't take her meds very often. Nate's earliest memory of his mom was her dropping a plate, then sitting on the floor in the middle of the pieces, and crying her eyes out. When Nate was 9, she set up a terrarium with a bearded dragon named Stan to surprise him. After a couple of years, Ellen went off her meds completely and started doing drugs. When Nate was 11, she took off and didn't come back until he was 14. She later came back talking about a farm commute she had moved to in Oregon. Though she promised she'd take Nate to Oregon, Ellen left without him again. She later came back when Nate was 17 and revealed that she was sober and wanted to fix her relationship with Nate.  gdergdfgfbcv

characters.name: Ellen Macauley
characters.description: Ellen MacauleyBiographical InformationAge40sGenderFemaleEye ColorGreenHair ColorBlondeStatusAliveRelationshipsFamilyMacauley(son)Romance(s)Brad Macauley(ex-husband)PortrayalPortrayerAidee WalkerSeasons1First AppearanceOne of Us Is GrievingEllen Macauleyis one of the recurring characters in thePeacockoriginal series,One Of Us Is Lying. She is portrayed byAidee Walker. She isNate's mother who fails to fulfill her parental responsibilities and chose to leave him andhis father.

characters.description: Evan NiemanBiographical InformationAge17StatusAlivePhysical DescriptionGenderMaleRelationship InformationFriendsBronwyn Rojas Evan W. Neimanis a Mathlete who was previously in a relationship withBronwyn Rojas. Bronwyn said they made a solid couple but she was planning her post-Bayview life, so they were an until-graduation couple, at most. She didn't notice any chemistry between them when they first kissed. By the end of the book, it is sort of implied that she is getting back together withNateand not staying with Evan.

characters.name: Jake Riordan
characters.description: Jake RiordanBiographical InformationAge17GenderMaleStatusDeceasedCause of DeathShot byAddy PrentissCharacter InformationOccupationStudent (Bayview High)Captain (Bayview High Football Team)EducationBayview HighRelationshipsFamilyScott (father)Katherine (mother)Cole(brother)FriendsVanessa ClarkKeely MooreFiona Jennings†Romance(s)Addy Prentiss(ex-girlfriend)Giselle Ward†(alleged adventure)Fiona Jennings†(one-sided crush, his side)EnemiesAddy PrentissCooper Clay(former best friend)TJ Forrester(former best friend)Bronwyn RojasNate MacauleySimon Kelleher(former childhood best friend)†Janae MatthewsPortrayalPortrayerBarrett CarnahanSeasons1,2(body, hallucination)First AppearanceLast AppearancePilotOne of Us Is Dead(alive)Jake Riordanis one of the main characters in thePeacockoriginal series,One Of Us Is Lying. He is portrayed asBarrett Carnahan. He is the captain of the football team and the boyfriend ofAddy, Jake seems to have it all, but it's never enough. Jake and Addy were in a relationship and have been together for a while. Jake is very controlling and manipulative in the relationship, and doesn’t like liars or cheaters as his dad ruined his mom's life.  Jake had been away all summer in Greece, and ghosted Addy the whole time which led to her thinking he was ending it with her.  So she started cheating on him with TJ Forrester. Although Simon told Jake that Addy was cheating on him at the house party, everyone found out when Simon posted it on About that.  Jake then broke up with Addy, and was angry at the fact Addy lied to him but throughout the next few episodes, he revealed that he wanted to get back with her. Jake hosts a Halloween party in the last episode ‘One of Us is Dead’ where he goes as a magician and convinces Addy to go as a rabbit, even though she didn’t want to. The ‘Murder Club’ are there to find the Xbox where it has been discovered that he was talking to Simon through a chat room about for framing the ‘Murder Club’ for Simons own fake assassin attempt. This was all being secretly recorded by Simon. When Jake finds out what they are doing he gets a gun and confront Cooper and Nate. When he gets into the room Addy and Bronwyn have already got the Xbox and jumped out the window. Jake then chased Addy in his car while she riding her bike , he chases her off the road and they both start running into the wood until he finally catches up with her. He holds the gun towards her and other members of the ‘Murder Club’ demanding the Xbox until Janae hits him with a baseball bat and the gun is dropped.  Jake is discovered to have been shot and dies in the woods.

characters.name: Janae Matthews
characters.description: Janae MatthewsBiographical InformationAge17GenderGenderfluidEye ColorGreenHair ColorBlack and blondeStatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent (Bayview High)EducationBayview High SchoolRelationshipsFamilyMr. Matthews(father)FriendsSimon Kelleher†Addy PrentissBronwyn RojasCooper ClayNate MacauleyRomance(s)Maeve Rojas(ex girlfriend)EnemiesJake Riordan†PortrayalPortrayerJessica McLeodSeasons1,2First AppearancePilotJanae Matthewsis one of the main characters in thePeacockoriginal series,One Of Us Is Lying. They are portrayed byJess McLeod. A punk outsider who hates their fake classmates, Janae is left angry and alone when their only friend is murdered. Rather than simply grieve his death, they promise to honor his bitter legacy. Janae befriendedSimonat Bayview High, and they were the one who gave him the idea to start AboutThat. Later on, Janae would regret how far he went with the app. In junior year, they were hesitant to act on their crush onMaeve, so Simon made a move on her first. Drunk, angry, and hurt, they bought drugs from Nate and overdosed at a party. Nate calls an ambulance and saves them in time.

characters.name: Maeve Rojas
characters.description: Maeve RojasBiographical InformationAge17StatusAliveOccupationStudentPhysical DescriptionGenderFemaleRelationship InformationFamilyMr. Rojas (father)Mrs. Rojas (mother)Bronwyn Rojas(sister)FriendsAddy PrentissNate MacauleyPhoebe LawtonKnox MyersCooper ClayKrisEnemiesSimon KelleherJake Riordan Maeve RojasisBronwyn Rojas' younger sister. She is 17 and attends Bayview High, the same school her sister went to inOne of Us is Lying. She had cancer when she was younger, affecting her attendance in school as she was usually in and out of hospital wards, which is why people at school called her “Sick Girl”. She has called herself the "slacker" of the Rojas family. Maeve successfully hacked the Tumblr and found the 4chan threads that linked toSimon Kelleher's online presence in the first book, allowing the Bayview to get new information about the case.

characters.name: Maeve Rojas
characters.description: Maeve RojasBiographical InformationAge16GenderFemaleEye ColorBrownHair ColorBlackStatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent (Bayview High)"Slacker"EducationBayview High SchoolRelationshipsFamilyJavier Rojas(father)Isabella Rojas(mother)Bronwyn Rojas(sister)FriendsJanae MatthewsAddy PrentissCooper ClayNate Macauleyknox myers(book)Romance(s)Janae Matthews(ex-girlfriend)Simon Kelleher†(fling)PortrayalPortrayerMelissa CollazoSeasons2First AppearanceLast AppearancePilotOne of Us Is DeadMaeve Rojasis one of the main characters in thePeacockoriginal series,One Of Us Is Lying. She is portrayed byMelissa Collazo. "Slacker" She isBronwyn's little sister. Maeve developed a tough demeanor while losing years to a childhood fight with Leukemia. In remission now, she's hungry to make up for lost time. She's sassy, and opinionated.

characters.name: Nathaniel Macauley
characters.description: Nate MacauleyBiographical InformationAge17StatusAlivePhysical DescriptionGenderMaleRelationship InformationFamilyMr. Macauley(father)Ellen Macauley(mother)FriendsAddy PrentissCooper ClayBronwyn RojasEnemiesSimon KelleherJake Riordan  Nate Macauley is a senior at Bayview High, and accused of the murder of Simon Kelleher. He is on probation for selling drugs at the start of the book, which gives him a poor reputation in the press. Nate Macauley is a generally closed up character, He doesn't quite like talking about himself. He is reserved and likes to handle his problems on his own, Since his parents are divorced and are barely there in his life to support him in his struggles, he takes things into his own hands as he is sure that he can solve them himself. As it is shown with his drug-dealing or his active response to Simons death, as he was the only one who reacted trying to help him. He is quick minded and way smarter then he thinks he is. He can't accept help from anyone and distances himself once it gets offered. He is extremely annyoed by his probation surveillance. Since she is the only really present adult figur in his life he feels surpressed and constantly reminded of his miserable life. He is really aware of his bad situation and feels emberassed about it as it is shown once Bronwyn visits him. He also has a lizard that he treasures a lot. He cares for it which seems to give him a ground under his feet to prevent him from lashing out or losing it.Because, no matter how much he seem to hold up against the abuse his parents force him to go through he is still burdened a lot, which shows and explains how he develops further on in the story

characters.name: Nate Macauley
characters.description: Nate MacauleyBiographical InformationAge18GenderMaleEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlondeBirthdayMarchHeight6'0StatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent (Bayview High)WaiterEducationBayview HighRelationshipsFamilyBrad Macauley(father)Ellen Macauley(mother)Stan (pet)FriendsBronwyn RojasCooper ClayAddy PrentissJanae MatthewsFiona JenningsRomance(s)Bronwyn Rojas(girlfriend)Amber (fling)Fiona Jennings (fling)EnemiesSimon Kelleher†Jake Riordan†Vanessa Clark(formerly)Ellen MacauleyCole RiordanGiselle Ward†Fiona Jennings†PortrayalPortrayerCooper van GrootelSeasons1First AppearanceLast AppearancePilotOne of Us Is DeadNateis one of the main characters in thePeacockoriginal series,One Of Us Is Lying. He is portrayed byCooper van Grootel. He is the school's most notorious drug dealer, a delinquent who lives alone with his alcoholic father. But that's not the only reason he's the police's prime suspect. Nathaniel “Nate” Macauley had a rocky childhood growing up in Bayview, as his father Brad was a heavy alcoholic and his mother Ellen suffered from Bipolar Disorder, which led her to leave the family. Shortly after this, Nate began dealing drugs which became his profession before joining Victors in Season 2. It is noted that he has 2 strikes on his record for dealing drugs and is on probation.
